sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9719" key="a)ntergolabe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντεργολᾰβέω</orth>, <sense id="n9719.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">compete with,</tr_> <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">τι</itype> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">in</tr_> a thing, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0500.tlg001:3:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Posidipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
